pi_items.source: Verified by checking export_result.sh which hardcodes SCREENSHOT_PATH as well as task.json task description.
Verified by checking export_result.sh which hardcodes REPORT_PATH as well as task.json task description.
Verified in verifier.py which uses 5000 as the default size minimum and scores based on screenshot_size >= min_screenshot_size.
Verified in verifier.py which evaluates angle bounds against angle_min=1.0 and task.json description specifies bounds 1.0 to 179.0.
Verified in verifier.py which evaluates angle bounds against angle_max=179.0 and task.json description specifies bounds 1.0 to 179.0.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires measuring an angle on a medical scan using the Weasis DICOM Viewer. The provided DICOM file is a real anonymized medical imaging sample (X-Ray Angiography) downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM). The agent must save a screenshot to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/angle_measurement.png (at least 5000 bytes in size) and generate a report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/angle_report.txt containing the measured angle, which is strictly validated to be between 1.0 and 179.0 degrees.
